title: FORGED ASCENT – Focused Survival Modpack
description:
FORGED ASCENT – Focused Survival Modpack
Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)

🌍 Explore huge biomes, fight smarter enemies & bosses 🗡️, master tech ⚙️ and magic ✨, all balanced for solo survival. Optimized quality-of-life features make long-term worlds smooth an
body:
This is a high-quality survival modpack, designed for long-term progression, meaningful exploration, and challenging combat — without unnecessary bloat. Every mod included has a purpose; nothing is filler.

✨ Key Features:

🌍 Exploration: Large, diverse biomes; improved dungeons, strongholds & bosses

⚙️ Tech & Automation: Create and choose tech mods with clear progression

✨ Magic & Progression: Botania, Nature’s Aura, Ars Nouveau — balanced for solo survival

🗡️ Combat: Smarter enemies, challenging bosses, optional scaling difficulty

🛠️ Quality of Life: Smart storage, inventory management, map navigation, optimized performance

💻 System Requirements:

RAM: 6 GB minimum | 10–12 GB recommended

CPU: Quad-Core 3 GHz minimum | Hexa-Core 4 GHz recommended

GPU: GTX 1050 / RX 560 minimum | GTX 1660 Super / RTX 2060+ recommended

Storage: SSD recommended, 10+ GB free

Java: 17 64-bit

Mod Count: ~137

🎯 Focus: Survival, Exploration, Progression, Solo-friendly
📝 Notes:

Designed for long-term singleplayer worlds

Clear early → mid → late game progression

Balanced challenge without artificial grind
